title: Nezumi Steals Nami’s Hope
scene: On pages 10–13, the story moves through Arlong Park and Nami’s dangerous position among the fish-men. The crew follows Nami’s trail toward the island ruled by Arlong and begins to learn how dangerous her home is.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But... you came back to barate before catching up with her, right?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So how do you know for sure where Nami was headed to?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Isn't it possible that her destination happened to be in that same direction?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: me and Johnny have a strong feeling about this,

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Based on what happened earlier on...!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Johnny, what's this?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's the wanted posters.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: "If you

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: What's wrong, Sis? You've been just staring at those wanted posters.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: No,

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: It's nothing.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Oh, eyeing the high-bounty, are you now?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: But it's best not to go for that one.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Sister Nami was definitely staring intently at Arlong's wanted poster.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: And right after we said Arlong's crew was wreaking havoc again recently,

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: She took off with the treasure.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: This is too much to be a coincidence.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: I'm sure there's some conne...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: How about this?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: All you did was draw your previous fish standing upright.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: But I wonder just what Nami has to do with those fishermen?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Could it be that she's a mermaid? That would explain her beauty...

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: ...like this?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: You're Dead Meat!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Do you understand what I'm trying to say here!?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Yeah, there's a strong fishman dude, got it.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: No, you don't! You can't imagine just how power- full he is!

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Well, I'll see when we get there.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Yeah, that's right. Don't sweat it, Yosaku.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: God, talking to you two is just useless!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: In any case, let's eat.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: What do you want?

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Meat on a bone!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Stir-fried bean sprouts!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Alright, just leave it to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahh, sure is nice having a cook around.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wish I could hurry up and cook for Nami instead of you doofuses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Stir- fried! Bean sprouts! Big helping!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: NorthWest region of East Blue

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Here's the pay for this month.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Take it.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: As always, thank you very much.

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Marine 16th branch Captain Nezumi

dialogue.speaker: Arlong
dialogue.text: Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi Chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi chi ch

summary: This part builds the Arlong Park conflict by showing how Nami’s choices look contradictory from outside while Arlong’s power keeps the island trapped.
